summary.zh: 文档查看器加载更稳，Markdown 表格与列表编辑更顺手，聊天滚动和移动端焦点也更可靠。
summary.en: Viewer windows load more reliably, Markdown tables and list editing feel smoother, and chat scrolling plus mobile focus behave more predictably.

title.zh: 文档查看器不再卡在加载页
title.en: Viewer windows stop getting stuck on Loading

summary.zh: 查看器改为由窗口主动拉取内容，避免冷启动时推送早于监听注册导致载荷丢失。
summary.en: Viewer windows now pull their payload explicitly, preventing cold-start races where content was pushed before the renderer subscribed.

sources.title: fix: viewer window Loading race via explicit pull contract

title.zh: Markdown 表格在内容宽度内换行
title.en: Markdown tables wrap within the content width

summary.zh: 聊天与截图分享里的宽表格不再横向滚动，改为在版面内自动换行显示。
summary.en: Wide tables in chat and screenshot shares wrap inside the layout instead of forcing horizontal scrolling.

sources.title: fix: wrap markdown tables instead of horizontal scroll (#2063)
fix: wrap screenshot share markdown tables within content width

title.zh: 聊天滚动与移动端焦点更稳定
title.en: Chat scrolling and mobile focus are more stable

summary.zh: 回合结束后的滚动跟随更贴底，下拉菜单在滚动时会关闭，移动端输入焦点恢复也更可靠。
summary.en: Turn-end scrolling stays pinned to the bottom, dropdowns close while scrolling, and mobile input focus restores more reliably.

sources.title: fix: turn-end scroll stickiness, dropdown scroll-close scope, mobile focus restore (#2045)

title.zh: 富文本列表编辑更顺手

summary.zh: 列表草稿在切换或重开时会被保留；Shift+Enter 可在当前项内拆出新列表项。
summary.en: List drafts are preserved when you navigate away and back; Shift+Enter splits the current item into a new list entry.

sources.title: fix: preserve rich list input drafts
fix: split list item on shift enter

title.en: Chapter navigation moves to the right edge

summary.zh: Markdown 长文的章节目录栏改到右侧，阅读区布局更一致。
summary.en: The chapter rail for long Markdown documents now sits on the right edge for a more consistent reading layout.

sources.title: fix: move markdown chapter rail to the right edge

title.zh: 交互卡片隐藏多余滚动条

summary.zh: 交互式卡片区域不再显示多余的滚动条，视觉更干净。
summary.en: Interactive card surfaces no longer show redundant scrollbars, keeping the layout cleaner.

title.zh: 封面提示路径判断更可靠
title.en: Cover notice routing is more reliable

summary.zh: 封面相关提示的路径分支收窄得更明确，减少误判。
summary.en: Cover notice handling now uses explicit discriminant narrowing so path-specific prompts are less likely to misfire.

sources.title: fix: explicit discriminant narrowing in cover notice paths
